column6: API Gateway stage name included in all endpoint URLs

column6: API Gateway integration timeout in seconds before returning 504 to caller

column6: Lambda function name for the POST /classify mood classification endpoint

column6: Memory allocation in MB for the Classifier Lambda; determines proportional CPU

column6: Maximum execution duration in seconds for the Classifier Lambda

column6: Lambda runtime environment for the Classifier function

column6: Pre-initialized Lambda instance count for Classifier; 0 disables provisioned concurrency

column6: Amazon Bedrock foundation model ID used for mood classification inference

column6: Maximum token count for Bedrock InvokeModel response on classification requests

column6: Lambda function name for the GET /recommend personalized playlist endpoint

column6: Memory allocation in MB for the Recommender Lambda

column6: Maximum execution duration in seconds for the Recommender Lambda

column6: Maximum execution duration in seconds for the Auto-Tagger Lambda per S3 event

column6: Maximum Bedrock invocation retry count inside Auto-Tagger Lambda before routing to DLQ

column6: SQS dead-letter queue name for failed Auto-Tagger S3 event processing

column6: Amazon API Gateway REST API resource name

column6: API Gateway usage plan steady-state rate limit in requests per second
